name: capstone-tool
title: capstone-tool
summary: lightweight multi-architecture disassembly framework - command line tool
description:
lightweight multi-architecture disassembly framework - command line tool
Capstone is a lightweight multi-platform, multi-architecture disassembly
framework.
.
This package contains cstool, a command-line tool to disassemble
hexadecimal strings.

commands.name: cstool
commands.description: Cstool for Capstone Disassembler Engine v5.0.7

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cstool because lightweight multi-architecture disassembly framework - command line tool.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cstool as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cstool [options] [args]` as documented upstream for cstool.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cstool with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cstool --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
